<!-- Generated by AI on 05/04/2026 -->

# Technical Specification

This is the technical specification for the spec detailed in .agent-os/specs/2026-05-04-phase-1-foundation/spec.md

## Technical Requirements

### Backend

- `ThoughtEntry` domain model: `string Id`, `string UserId`, `string Text`, `DateTimeOffset CreatedAt` — stored in `Models/ThoughtEntry.cs`
- `IThoughtRepository` interface with methods: `CreateAsync`, `GetByUserAsync` (paginated), `DeleteAsync`
- `AzureTableStorageThoughtRepository`: partition key = `UserId`, row key = inverted timestamp (`DateTimeOffset.MaxValue.Ticks - CreatedAt.Ticks`) for reverse-chronological ordering
- `InMemoryThoughtRepository`: thread-safe in-memory implementation using `ConcurrentDictionary`
- Startup registration: if `AZURE_TABLE_STORAGE_CONNECTION_STRING` env var is non-empty, register `AzureTableStorageThoughtRepository`; otherwise register `InMemoryThoughtRepository`
- `ThoughtsController` under `Controllers/Thoughts/` with `[Authorize]`, route `api/thoughts`
- All controller actions must be `async` and use `await` — never `.Result` or `.Wait()`
- Use `ICurrentUserService` to resolve `UserId` for all data operations — never read auth headers directly in controllers
- Pagination: `GET /api/thoughts` accepts `?page=1&pageSize=20`; default page size 20, max 100
- Error responses must use the standard error response structure (correlationId, status, title, detail, source)
- All responses must include `Cache-Control: no-store` header (no caching)

### Frontend

- React Query (`useQuery`, `useMutation`) for all API calls — no direct `fetch` calls in components
- API client functions in `frontend/src/api/thoughts.ts`
- `ThoughtInput` component: MUI `TextField` + `Button` with loading state during submission; clears field on success
- `ThoughtList` component: MUI `List` of `ThoughtCard` items; each card shows text + formatted timestamp + delete icon button
- `ThoughtCard` component: shows thought text, relative time (e.g., "2 hours ago"), and a delete `IconButton`
- Page component `ThoughtsPage` assembled from the above components; lives in `frontend/src/pages/`
- Route: `/thoughts` — added to React Router config in `App.tsx`
- Landing page or app header should link to `/thoughts`
- All MUI components use Paycor Design System theme provider already configured in the app

### Error Handling

- API returns `400` with standard error body for empty text submissions
- API returns `404` with standard error body when deleting a thought that does not exist or belongs to another user
- Frontend shows MUI `Alert` (error severity) when a mutation fails
- Frontend handles loading states on all async operations with `CircularProgress` or disabled button states

## External Dependencies

- **Azure.Data.Tables** — Azure Table Storage SDK for .NET. Required for `AzureTableStorageThoughtRepository`. Add to `AntarMindAI.Api.csproj`.
  - **Justification:** Official Azure SDK for Table Storage; no alternative without rewriting low-level REST calls.
